title: A Student's Day
article_text: Today, I lead my group for a class project. We buy some paper for the forms. I hope to understand the reason for the task. My face shows a big smile. The cost of the car is less than an hour of work. There is a room in the school for our meeting. We hold the meeting until the head teacher comes. I thank my friends for their help. I believe this idea is good. The service at the store is far from our school.

The service at the store is far from our school.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to want something to happen'?
What is the Chinese meaning of 'cost'?
Which word means 'up to a certain time'?
What is the Chinese meaning of 'form'?
Which word means 'to say you are happy about something someone did'?

image_prompts: A student leading a group of classmates in a classroom for a project.
Students buying paper at a store for their school forms.
A student thinking with a question mark, trying to understand a task.
A close-up of a smiling face of a student.
A car with a price tag next to a clock showing one hour.
An empty school room with chairs and a table for a meeting.
A group of students holding a meeting while a teacher watches from the door.
A student shaking hands with friends and saying thank you.
A student pointing at a lightbulb (idea) with a happy expression.
A store far away from a school building, with a sign reading 'service'.
